title: EinsMensch_´s Hero Pack
description:
A Hero Pack for Palladium with 4 Powers 
(1 Wip)
body: This Minecraft mod for version 1.20.1 (Forge) is an add-on for Palladium that adds Cyberware implants and Mech Suits to the game. These can be equipped by the player and grant special abilities, enhancing gameplay with futuristic technology.
